arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest host Liverpool in a huge Premier League contest on Tuesday night. This evening’s clash is arguably the biggest contest between the teams in four decades. Nuno Espirito Santo’s side, who have won six straight league games, can move within three points of their league-leading opponents with a win. arts.ttl: Everton, Liverpool and rivals set to discover PSR fate today amid points deduction threat
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Jamie Gardner PA Chief Sports Reporter, Keifer MacDonald)
arts.sum: The Premier League will issue complaints to clubs in breach of its profitability and sustainability rules (PSR), and therefore at risk of a points deduction, on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: Has Liverpool defender rubbished Real Madrid rumours, given Arne Slot full commitment?
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is under pressure to clarify his future amidst speculation that he could join Real Madrid for free in the summer.

arts.ttl: Can Nottingham Forest do a Leicester? Throwback title charge evokes magical memories
arts.sum: For the first time since 1979, Nottingham Forest’s encounter with Liverpool is being billed as a title clash – but can Nuno Espirito Santo’s side keep their remarkable run going?
